## Meeting Purpose

[Melissa guides David through WordPress blog post creation and image design processes for na-mii.co.](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [WordPress backend walkthrough: creating posts, adding elements, and troubleshooting common issues](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Figma tutorial for creating blog post cover images, including font usage and export settings](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining consistent styling and avoiding copy-paste errors from Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Upcoming template changes to improve mobile responsiveness and code snippet display](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

## Topics

### WordPress Backend Navigation

  - [Melissa demonstrates navigating WordPress backend for blog post creation](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Highlights importance of using new template (still in progress) to avoid inherited mistakes](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Shows how to break up sections, typically done when inserting images](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Adding Elements to Posts

  - [Demonstrates adding quote blocks: Templates \> Quote Style \> Quote One](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Explains process for inserting and positioning elements within the post](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Covers code snippet insertion, including current limitations and workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Using Carbon for visually interesting code displays](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Styling and Formatting

  - [Emphasizes removing extra code and spans when pasting from Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

  - [Demonstrates how to add and format bullet points within posts](https://fathom.video/share/UfiRw-nMshaZ2nb4vG1zHiedMd4dwMYA?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
